description.value:
Access You're invited by a current member of the Eagle Knights or the People's Council.

You're a wall of metal standing against the tide of Andoran's enemies. When you Raise a Shield, you also gain your shield's circumstance bonus to your Fortitude DC against attempts to [[/act grapple]], [[/act reposition]], or [[/act shove]] you. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Additional Lore] general feat for Warfare Lore. If you were already trained in Warfare Lore, you also become trained in a Lore skill of your choice.

Special You can take this dedication even if you haven't taken more than two non-dedication feats from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.gVipISIgPjNbOUhk]{Eagle Knight} archetype.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.7kXfvt5td5N9Fu79]{Golden Legionnaire}
